title: “We’re told they…”: Candace Owens challenges Andrew Kolvet with ‘retraction’ demand in escalating Charlie Kirk feud
summary_full: Candace Owens and TPUSA spokesman Andrew Kolvet publicly clashed after Kolvet questioned a Daily Mail report involving Erika Kirk. Owens responded by posting screenshots she said showed the newspaper requested comment before publication. Kolvet accused her of benefiting from the controversy, while Owens challenged TPUSA to seek legal action if the reported quotes were fabricated.
